Academic Projects
2022-2024
COMSATS, Islamabad


Medical Inventory System | Java, Mongo DB
Developed an all-in-one Medical Inventory Management System to facilitate seamless interaction among doctors,
patients, and hospital management. The system centralizes the management of medical supplies, tracks inventory in
real-time, and ensures efficient operations across various hospital departments.
Implemented role-based access control to restrict functionality based on user roles, ensuring secure and efficient
management.
Automated alerts for low-stock items, expiration tracking for medical supplies, and streamlined order placements.
Advanced Billing System | Java, Java Swing
Created a city-wide Electricity Billing System to automate bill calculations for users, track usage data, and maintain a
record of the last two months� bills in a structured text file format.
Designed an interactive Java Swing GUI for entering usage details, viewing bills, and generating invoices using Java file
handling to store and retrieve user data, maintaining a record bills in text files for audit and user reference.
Enhanced data security and integrity by validating user inputs and file operations to prevent errors in bill calculations.
